import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn bat(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn get_int(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn find_index(_ tokens: String, _ needle: String) -> Option<Int>
  let tn = string.len(tokens)
  mut i = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut result: Option<Int> = None
  mut done = false
  while not done and i < tn
    mut j = i
    mut scan = true
    while scan
      if j >= tn
        scan = false
      else
        if bat(tokens, j) == 10
          scan = false
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      end
    end
    if string.substring(tokens, i, j) == needle
      result = Some(idx)
      done = true
    end
    i = j + 1
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  result
end

fn get_token_at(_ tokens: String, _ target: Int) -> String
  let tn = string.len(tokens)
  mut i = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut result = ""
  mut done = false
  while not done and i < tn
    mut j = i
    mut scan = true
    while scan
      if j >= tn
        scan = false
      else
        if bat(tokens, j) == 10
          scan = false
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      end
    end
    if idx == target
      result = string.substring(tokens, i, j)
      done = true
    end
    i = j + 1
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  result
end

fn increment_at(_ counts: List<Int>, _ target: Int, _ n: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut t = 0
  while t < n
    let old = get_int(counts, t)
    if t == target
      out = list.push(out, old + 1)
    else
      out = list.push(out, old)
    end
    t = t + 1
  end
  out
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let total = string.len(input)

mut tokens = ""
mut counts: List<Int> = []
mut num_tokens = 0

mut i = 0
while i < total
  if is_ws(bat(input, i))
    i = i + 1
  else
    let start = i
    mut j = i
    mut scan = true
    while scan
      if j >= total
        scan = false
      else
        if is_ws(bat(input, j))
          scan = false
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      end
    end
    let tok = string.substring(input, start, j)
    match find_index(tokens, tok)
    when Some(k)
      counts = increment_at(counts, k, num_tokens)
    when None
      tokens = "#{tokens}#{tok}\n"
      counts = list.push(counts, 1)
      num_tokens = num_tokens + 1
    end
    i = j
  end
end

mut best_idx = 0
mut best_count = 0
mut k = 0
while k < num_tokens
  let c = get_int(counts, k)
  if c > best_count
    best_count = c
    best_idx = k
  end
  k = k + 1
end

let best_token = get_token_at(tokens, best_idx)
println("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
